theme_strategy.vibe: Godlike sci-fi interface, high-contrast neon minimalism, digital playground
theme_strategy.reasoning: The user requested a 'fancy and animatic' futuristic/tech theme with neon effects, featuring interactive games and a cloud drive link. Archetype 7 provides the intense, glowing, and highly interactive digital canvas required for this experience.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase

layout_and_spacing.strategy: MODE A: THE 'TETRIS' GRID (Bento Grid Layout)
layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-12 md:py-24
layout_and_spacing.grid_structure: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 md:gap-8
layout_and_spacing.spacing_rules: Use generous padding inside cards (p-6 to p-8) to give text and content breathing room. Avoid centering everything; use aggressive asymmetry and sharp left-alignments for technical readouts.

background.configuration: Dark void with subtle cyan and magenta glowing nodes that react to mouse hover (repulse or connect lines). Must feel like a high-end digital matrix.

cards_surfaces.implementation: Cards should have a solid dark background (#0B0C10) with a 1px border. On hover, apply a glowing neon box-shadow or a framer-motion animated gradient border to simulate a trace beam. Content inside should slightly scale up or shift on hover.

multidrive_button.interaction: Clicking opens a Shadcn UI Dialog (Modal).
multidrive_button.modal_content: Displays a futuristic loading sequence with 'Powered by MultiNet' in kinetic typography, followed by a simulated redirect or a glowing confirmation button linking to 'cloud.multifocus.com'.

games_integration.interaction: Each game is represented as a glowing Bento Grid card. Clicking a card opens a full-screen or large Shadcn Dialog containing the actual playable React game component.

motion_and_interactions.global: Smooth scrolling, elements fade and slide up on scroll via framer-motion.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Magnetic button effect on major CTAs. Cards receive a pronounced glow (e.g., drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(5,217,232,0.5)]) and border color change on hover.
motion_and_interactions.kinetic_typography: Text split animations on headings where characters slide in sequentially on load.

image_urls.description: Abstract neon 3D background. Can be used as a heavy background texture or layered within the MultiDrive hero card with low opacity (e.g., opacity-20) to add depth.
Abstract 3D memory match cards floating in a void. Use as the background or thumbnail for the Puzzle Game card.
Retro futuristic glowing neon snake game grid. Use as the background or thumbnail for the Arcade (Snake) Game card.
Abstract futuristic glowing buttons on a metallic surface. Use as the background or thumbnail for the Reflex Game card.
Stylized 3D glowing neon dice rolling. Use as the background or thumbnail for the Casual (Dice) Game card.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup fonts: Import 'Unbounded' and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts and configure them in Tailwind.
2. Setup global CSS: Apply the deep void black (#05050A) to the body. Ensure custom scrollbars are implemented (no gutter).
3. Install required libraries: framer-motion for animations, react-tsparticles for the interactive background, lucide-react (or similar) for icons.
4. Background Implementation: Add a fixed particles background behind the main content that reacts to mouse movement (connecting lines or repulsing nodes).
5. Layout Implementation: Create a Bento Grid layout. The largest cell is the MultiDrive CTA. The remaining 4 cells are the interactive games.

6. MultiDrive Integration: Use Shadcn Dialog for the MultiDrive button. The modal should show 'Powered by MultiNet' using JetBrains Mono, then present an 'Access Drive' button linking to cloud.multifocus.com.

7. Games Implementation: For the 4 games, create actual mini React components (a simple memory match, a grid-based snake, a reflex clicker, and a random dice roller). Open them via Shadcn Dialogs when their respective bento cards are clicked.

8. Visual Polish: Ensure cards have an overlay using the provided image_urls (opacity-40, mix-blend-screen/overlay) over dark backgrounds, with sharp neon borders on hover. Texts must use high contrast.
9. Test IDs: Ensure all interactive elements (buttons, game tiles, modals) have explicit 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='multidrive-trigger').
